_doc: Runtime config for the X bot. Five scheduled slots/day (4 commodities + a Hashweight network-mass post), with varied format so it doesn't read as a ticker. run.ts maps the current UTC hour to a slot (or takes --slot explicitly). Budget guard tracks spend against the prepaid X credit balance.

budget._note: balanceCents is the prepaid X credit pool (authoritative balance lives at X; this is a local guard). At 2c/post, 500c ~= 250 posts. monthlyCap caps posts per calendar month regardless of remaining balance (5 slots/day x 31 = 155).
